_comment: Injury context per pitcher. Severity levels: season-ender-TJ, in-season, nagging-undiagnosed, pre-season, late-season, workload-tempering, org-change, minor, unique-role. Leave pitcher out if no known injury.

Meccage.label: In-season DL
Meccage.note: Two undisclosed stints in 2025: 16d in May (5/7→5/23), 33d Aug→Sep (8/1→9/3). Return-from-DL tune-up on 9/3 was a planned 14P cap in 1 IP.

Caminiti.label: Pre-season
Caminiti.note: Forearm tendinitis delayed his 2025 season start. First outing not until 5/9 in FCL tune-ups before Low-A promotion.

Meyer.label: Nagging
Meyer.note: Per Fish on First (Mar 2025): 'dealing with a nagging injury for most of his tenure with the Sky Carp' in 2024. Never officially IL'd but velocity/control/GB% all dropped after High-A promotion. Two 18-21 day gaps (6/8→6/27 and 7/3→7/24) consistent with trying to rest through it.

Knoth.label: TJ season-ender
Knoth.note: Placed on 7-day IL on 8/27/24 with elbow soreness after a normal 73P outing on 8/22. Offseason Tommy John surgery in January 2025, missed all of 2025. Data shows no pitch-count warning signs — his 53-85P range held through the final outing.

Harrison.label: Minor disruption
Harrison.note: 12-day gap after 7/11/25 short start (3 IP/53P). Partly All-Star Break but longer than pure break (+5d vs +2-4d typical). Only pitcher in dataset with a confirmed skipped rotation turn.

Sloan.label: Late-season IL
Sloan.note: Last regular start 9/8/25, placed on 7-day IL. Eye procedure later attributed. Season effectively over after activation on 9/22.

Zazueta.label: Workload tempering
Zazueta.note: 14-day gap 7/10/24 → 7/24/24 during 2024 at Rancho. Per Fangraphs, pattern continued into 2025 with a combined ankle sprain + workload tempering shutting him down for 6 weeks. LAD's deliberate '~70 IP cap' approach shows up both years.

Ziehl.label: Trade disruption
Ziehl.note: Traded from Yankees to White Sox on 7/30/25. Post-trade debut on 8/9 at new Low-A affiliate was a 1 IP / 36P disaster. ACWR spiked above 1.5 in the 3 starts immediately after the trade reset.

Cijntje.label: Piggyback role
Cijntje.note: NOT an injury — switch-pitcher uniquely deployed in piggyback/tandem role for the first 6 weeks at Everett (every 3-4 days, mixed pitch counts from 15-87P). Transitioned to normal rotation around 5/18/25. Promoted to Double-A Arkansas on 8/9/25, hit peak 99P on 9/3.

Cunningham.label: Shoulder IL — 65+ days
Cunningham.note: Placed on IL 6/9/25, activated 8/13/25 (65 days missed). Shoulder injury. Prior to IL he was dominant (1.93 ERA over 7 starts, pushed to 92-94P multiple times). Returned in August to short ramp-up outings (30-49P), then struggled in Arizona Fall League (10.38 ERA). Entering 2026 season on another IL. Volume pattern pre-injury: 5 of 7 starts above 90P is an aggressive load for a 22yo's first pro season.

Hess.label: Injury history + 27d gap
Hess.note: History: flexor strain 2023, HS back stress fracture. 2025 pro debut had a 27-day gap (5/29 → 6/25). Return outing was 1.2 IP/42P, a classic 'rest then ramp' pattern. No formal IL placement reported. Finished season healthy at AA but worth monitoring given history.

Nichols.label: Three IL stints
Nichols.note: 2024 season at Charleston included THREE separate 7-day IL stints: 6/20-6/29, 7/4-7/21, 8/14-8/27. Per beat-writer coverage: 'difficult 2024 season that involved a nagging injury.' Cleaner 2025 campaign — went 14-3, promoted to AA. Shows what repeated short-stint management of an underlying issue looks like in the data.
